name: feature.forms.agents
description: Forms feature agent pack (ADR 0014) — a manifest agent whose tools are feature.forms.nodes over the ctx.features.forms surface. Summarizes captured submissions into lead insights; tool-allowlisted to the Forms feature surface only, and READ-ONLY (it reports, it does not mutate forms or contacts). Mirrors feature.kb.agents.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Forms Lead Insights
agents.description: Summarizes a form's captured submissions into lead insights — volume, common answers, and follow-up suggestions — grounded via feature.forms.nodes.list-submissions over ctx.features.forms. Read-only: it reports, it never edits forms or contacts.
